episodes.title: Is Mormonism a Cult?
episodes.description: YES! Mormonism is a CULT! Also known a The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints or The Mormons, they are 100% a capital "C" Cult!!
subjects: The Church Of Jesus Christ Of Latter-Day Saints
